The source material is a script for a YouTube video. The slides you generate will act as a storyboard for that script. The content of the script must be preserved exactly and presented verbatim on the slides. 

The contents of the script should be split accross multiple slides with relevant visual elements to help drive home the points being made. The slides should be structured in a way that they can be easily followed by someone who has not read the script, and include all of the content from the script verbatim. 

The idea is that people can review these slides to review the content before a video is made. The slides should be easy to understand and visually engaging, while also accurately representing the content of the script verbatim.
